content: Memory graph uses LanceDB with openai/text-embedding-3-small at 512 dimensions for vector storage
Extraction dedup thresholds: 0.95 similarity = reinforce (identical), 0.85 similarity = review (related but potentially different)
Extraction triggers: every 20 user turns, /new command, compaction catch-up, 30-minute idle flush
Watermark advancement guardrail: last_extracted_index only advances after ALL items in batch successfully saved to graph
Nanobot uses XML-tagged transcript format for Haiku extraction: <transcript>, <context_section>, <extraction_section>
